title: Sunday Meditation & Satsang
description: A guided morning meditation followed by satsang and group discussion. Open to all levels. Mats and refreshments provided.

title: Weekend Yoga Retreat
description: A two-day immersive retreat covering asana, pranayama, and the philosophy of mind management. Includes sattvic meals.

title: Introduction to Bhagavad Gita
description: An accessible 6-week online course on the timeless wisdom of the Bhagavad Gita and how to apply it in daily life.

title: Kids Character Building Workshop
description: Bal-Mukund program teaching values, focus, and confidence to children aged 6-12 through stories, games, and activities.

title: Annual Janmashtami Celebration
description: Celebrate the birth of Lord Krishna with kirtan, abhishek, cultural performances, and prasad. Family friendly.

title: Pranayama & Breathwork Intensive
description: A half-day deep dive into breathing techniques for stress relief, energy, and focus. Suitable for beginners.

title: Seva Day: Community Service
description: Join us for a day of selfless service — park cleanup, food distribution, and community outreach. (Currently full — join the waitlist.)

title: Music & Kirtan Evening
description: An uplifting evening of devotional music and kirtan with live instruments. Come sing along and find inner peace.
